Loop × iHop

A QR-based table payment solution that elevates your guest experience, speeds up table turns, and grows your brand — with zero operational change on your end.

Prepared for iHop & Applebee's  ·  Confidential
01  ·  What is Loop?

The smarter way to pay at the table

Loop is District by Zomato's QR-based table payment product — built specifically for dine-in restaurants. Guests scan a QR code at their table, browse the menu, place orders, track their bill, and pay directly from their phone. No app downloads. No hardware changes. No disruption to your existing operations.

Loop sits on top of your current POS system and works transparently alongside your team, making every visit smoother for guests and more efficient for staff.

02  ·  How it Works

Five steps, seamless experience

01

Customer Arrives

Guest is seated at the table — the QR code is already there, printed on your existing table material or a tent card.

02

Scan the QR Code

Guest scans and instantly views the full menu on their phone. No app download required — it opens in the browser.

03

Order & Track

Browse the menu, place or add to orders, and track the running bill live — full transparency for the guest throughout the meal.

04

Pay Instantly at the Table

Tap to pay directly from their phone. Guests can split the bill with their group and tip staff — all without waiting for the check.

05

Review & Return

After payment, an automatic Google Review prompt is sent — growing your online brand presence with every transaction, organically.

03  ·  Why This Works for You

Built for high-volume dining

iHop and Applebee's run high-traffic, service-intensive floors. Loop is designed to reduce pressure on your team while increasing the quality of every guest interaction.

Zero Integration Effort

Plugs directly into your existing POS — no technical changes, no new hardware, no retraining required.

Faster Table Turns

Quicker payments mean more covers per shift, less waiting at peak hours, and happier guests.

Auto-Tip Feature

Guests are prompted to tip at checkout — increasing staff earnings with every transaction.

Bill Splitting

Groups split bills instantly on their phones — no awkward waits or manual calculations.

Google Review Prompts

Every checkout nudges a review — growing your online rating and visibility organically, at scale.

Dine-In Insights

Access real customer behaviour analytics from your dine-in audience — data you don't currently have.

05  ·  Closing the Loop

How do we close the loop?

Loop doesn't just process payments — it gives you visibility and tools to understand, retain, and re-engage every customer who walks through your door.

Transaction Confirmation

Once a customer has visited your location and completed their payment, you receive an instant update on the transaction under your Transactions dashboard. Every successful transaction is logged in real time — giving you a clear, always-up-to-date view of your dine-in revenue.

Customer Insights

Currently, you have limited visibility into who is actually dining with you. Through Loop's Customers section, you gain a complete picture of your dine-in audience — how many customers are new, how many are returning, frequency patterns, and overall performance metrics at a glance.

Drill deeper into any individual customer and you will find a rich profile including:

  • Spending capacity and average transaction value
  • Cuisine preferences based on their order history
  • Full transaction history across visits
  • Lifetime visits to your restaurant
  • Personal details such as birthday and phone number — useful for personalised outreach

This is a new capability we have introduced specifically to help you close the loop on your customers — not just servicing them on their first visit, but building a relationship that brings them back.

Engaging with All your Customers

Once you have run through your customer data — ideally on a weekly or monthly basis — we can help you nudge customers who haven't returned. For example, a push notification exclusive to a specific customer: "We missed you. Here is 30 AED off your next visit."

These are fully customisable, customer-specific promotions that we can run on your behalf based on the data Loop captures.

Note: Currently, the creation and sending of these promotions is managed by our team on your behalf. This is not yet a self-serve feature. Our long-term roadmap includes full integration with a marketing agency dedicated to dine-in customer engagement, which will allow you to communicate directly with your customers without our intervention — and this will be made available as a complimentary addition to your Loop partnership.

Ready to close the Loop?

Our goal is simple — to get all iHop and Applebee's outlets across the UAE live on Loop.

The sooner we start, the sooner you start seeing results.
